text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists on protocols.io but its full title is "Lightweight Brain Tumor Segmentation on Low-Resource Systems: A Step-by-Step Guide with 3D U-Net," and its real authors are Ayomide Oladele, Raymond Confidence, Dong Zhang, Charity Umoren, and others from the MAI Lab — not "Fatima Adebayo et al." No author named Fatima Adebayo appears anywhere in the protocol. The cited author name is completely fabricated, making this a grafted (hallucinated) reference.
LINK: https://www.protocols.io/view/lightweight-brain-tumor-segmentation-on-low-resour-gz4sbx8wf.html
